meta.title: Lazy Evaluation at Sea: Async Compute for Disconnected Environments
meta.tl;dr: Capture everything, compute when you can, alert only what's urgent.

problem.constraint: At sea: no internet, limited power, compute is scarce
problem.observation: Most data is cheap to capture but expensive to analyze
problem.insight: Analysis can be deferred. The snapshot is frozen. A fish photo from 2pm is still valid for species ID at 3am.

hot.constraint: ALWAYS local, ALWAYS immediate, NEVER deferred

warm.constraint: Local but deferred to low-load periods

cold.constraint: Batch when connected or during overnight idle

escalation.rule: If warm task detects anomaly, escalate to hot immediately
escalation.example: Camera analyzing overnight → spots oil leak pattern → becomes safety alert

daily_rhythm.0600: Engine on. Hot path: nav + safety. Camera starts snapping (queued warm).
daily_rhythm.0800_1800: Fishing. 200 snaps (warm), 50 engine readings (warm), continuous nav (hot). No spare compute.
daily_rhythm.1800_2000: Heading in. Warm queue processes: species ID from today's snaps, engine trend report.
daily_rhythm.2000_0600: Overnight idle. Cold queue: audio transcription, model fine-tuning, fleet sync if in range.
daily_rhythm.result: Everything gets processed. Nothing gets dropped. Priority ensures safety never waits.

pi_4b.upgrade_trigger: If warm queue backlog > 24h, recommend Jetson

jetson_orin.hot_capacity: Everything Pi can + real-time vision inference
jetson_orin.warm_capacity: Camera analysis in near-real-time, audio transcription (slower than real-time)
jetson_orin.upgrade_trigger: If multi-camera, recommend second unit + Commodore protocol

implementation.capture: O(log n) — always fast, never blocks
implementation.escalate: Move category up one priority level
implementation.persist: Queue survives restart — critical for power loss at sea

contradictions: Some captains want instant everything. Education required on the model.
